prompt:
---Task---
Extract entities and relationships from the input text in Data to be Processed below.

---Instructions---
1.  **Strict Adherence to Format:** Strictly adhere to all format requirements for entity and relationship lists, including output order, field delimiters, and proper noun handling, as specified in the system prompt.
2.  **Output Content Only:** Output *only* the extracted list of entities and relationships. Do not include any introductory or concluding remarks, explanations, or additional text before or after the list.
3.  **Completion Signal:** Output `<|COMPLETE|>` as the final line after all relevant entities and relationships have been extracted and presented.
4.  **Output Language:** Ensure the output language is English. Proper nouns (e.g., personal names, place names, organization names) must be kept in their original language and not translated.

---Data to be Processed---
<Entity_types>
["Person","Creature","Organization","Location","Event","Concept","Method","Content","Data","Artifact","NaturalObject"]

<Input Text>
```
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Since we last spoke, some big things have happened. Last week I went to an LGBTQ+ pride parade. Everyone was so happy and it made me feel like I belonged. It showed me how much our community has grown, it was amazing!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline, sounds like the parade was an awesome experience! It's great to see the love and support for the LGBTQ+ community. Congrats! Has this experience influenced your goals at all?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! It really motivated me for sure. Talking to the community made me want to use my story to help others too - I'm still thinking that counseling and mental health is the way to go. I'm super excited to give back. "
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! That's great! I just signed up for a pottery class yesterday. It's like therapy for me, letting me express myself and get creative. Have you found any activities that make you feel the same way?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, Melanie! I'm getting creative too, just learning the piano. What made you try pottery?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "I'm a big fan of pottery - the creativity and skill is awesome. Plus, making it is so calming. Look at this!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "That bowl is gorgeous! The black and white design looks so fancy. Did you make it?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Yeah, I made this bowl in my class. It took some work, but I'm pretty proud of it."
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Nice job! You really put in the work and it definitely shows. Your creativity looks great!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Your kind words mean a lot. Pottery is a huge part of my life, not just a hobby - it helps me express my emotions. Clay is incredible, it brings me so much joy!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, Mel, I'm so stoked for you that art is helping you express yourself and bring you joy! Keep it up!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! I'm excited to see where pottery takes me. Anything coming up you're looking forward to?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks Mel! I'm going to a transgender conference this month. I'm so excited to meet other people in the community and learn more about advocacy. It's gonna be great!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Sounds awesome, Caroline! Have a great time and learn a lot. Have fun!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Cool, thanks Mel! Can't wait. I'll keep ya posted. Bye!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Bye, Caroline! Can't wait to hear about it. Have fun and stay safe!"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Hey Mel! Long time no talk. Lots has been going on since then!"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Hey Caroline! Missed you. Anything new? Spill the beans!"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Since our last chat, I've been looking into counseling or mental health work more. I'm passionate about helping people and making a positive impact. It's tough, but really rewarding too. Anything new happening with you?"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "That's awesome, Caroline! Congrats on following your dreams. Yesterday I took the kids to the museum - it was so cool spending time with them and seeing their eyes light up!"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Melanie, that's a great pic! That must have been awesome. What were they so stoked about?"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "They were stoked for the dinosaur exhibit! They love learning about animals and the bones were so cool. It reminds me why I love being a mom."
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Being a mom is awesome. I'm creating a library for when I have kids. I'm really looking forward to reading to them and opening up their minds."
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Sounds great! What kind of books you got in your library?"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "I've got lots of kids' books- classics, stories from different cultures, educational books, all of that. What's a favorite book you remember from your childhood?"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "I loved reading "Charlotte's Web" as a kid. It was so cool seeing how friendship and compassion can make a difference."
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, that's great! It sure shows how important friendship and compassion are. It's made me appreciate how lucky I am to have my friends and family helping with my transition. They make all the difference. We even had a picnic last week!"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "That's a gorgeous photo, Caroline! Wow, the love around you is awesome. How have your friends and fam been helping you out with your transition?"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie! This support network has been amazing. They've been there for me every step of the way giving me love, guidance, and acceptance. I couldn't have done it without them."
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! It's great you have people to support you, that's really awesome!"
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Caroline said: "I'm so lucky to have such a great support system around me. Their love and encouragement has really helped me accept and grow into my true self. They've been instrumental in my transition."
[8:18 pm on 6 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Glad you have support, Caroline! Unconditional love is so important. Here's a pic of my family camping at the beach. We love it, it brings us closer!"
```
